translations: He (is) the One Who created you
and among you (is) a disbeliever and among you
(is) a believer And Allah of what
puzzle.hint: A verse about Allah's perfect knowledge of all deeds and the Day of Return
puzzle.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ فَمِنكُمْ كَافِرٌۭ وَمِنكُم مُّؤْمِنٌۭ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ
puzzle.verseEn: It is He who created you, and among you is the disbeliever, and among you is the believer. And Allāh, of what you do, is Seeing.
